title: Press Release 21.10.2024 [Malay-English] – Corporate Income Tax Socialisation Session
text:
SIARAN AKHBAR
KEMENTERIAN KEWANGAN DAN EKONOMI
SESI PEMBERIGAAN CUKAI PENDAPATAN KORPORAT
1. Kementerian Kewangan dan Ekonomi (MOFE) melalui Bahagian Hasil telah mengadakan Sesi
Pemberigaan Cukai Pendapatan Korporat pada hari Isnin, 21hb. Oktober 2024 yang berlangsung
di Bilik Serbaguna 2, Tingkat 3, Island Block, MOFE.
2. Sesi ini bertujuan bagi meningkatkan kefahaman kepada syarikat mengenai pentadbiran cukai di
Negara ini serta membantu syarikat untuk meningkatkan kesedaran terhadap pematuhan Cukai
Pendapatan Korporat.
3. Sesi telah disampaikan oleh YM Awang Nor Taufiq bin Haji Rajali, Pegawai Kewangan dari Bahagian
Hasil, MOFE yang antaranya telah menjelaskan secara menyeluruh tentang Cukai Pendapatan
Korporat termasuk Basis of Assessment, Pematuhan Cukai (Tax Obligation), Perkiraan Cukai (Tax
Computation) dan Pemfailan Cukai (Tax Filing) selaras dengan Akta Cukai Pendapatan, Penggal
35.
-TAMAT-
Disediakan oleh:
Bahagian Hasil
Kementerian Kewangan dan Ekonomi
Emel: revenue@mofe.gov.bn
Rujukan: H/KORP/27
Tarikh: 18 Rabiulakhir 1446
22 Oktober 2024

PRESS RELEASE
MINISTRY OF FINANCE AND ECONOMY
CORPORATE INCOME TAX SOCIALISATION SESSION
1. The Revenue Division, Ministry of Finance and Economy (MOFE) held a Socialisation Session on
Corporate Income Tax on Monday, 21st October 2024 which took place at Bilik Serbaguna 2, Level
3, MOFE.
2. The session hopes to spread awareness and ensure common understanding with regards to
Corporate Income Tax matters among taxpayers, and to help taxpayers to increase their level of
tax compliance.
3. The session was delivered by YM Awang Nor Taufiq bin Haji Rajali, Finance Officer at the Revenue
Division, MOFE whereby he explained the overview of Corporate Income Tax including the Basis of
Assessment, Tax Obligation, Tax Computation and Tax Filing in accordance with the Income Tax
Act, Chapter 35.
-END-
Prepared by:
Revenue Division
Ministry of Finance and Economy
Email: revenue@mofe.gov.bn
Rujukan: H/KORP/27
Tarikh: 18 Rabiulakhir 1446
22 October 2024
